crates.name: vmux_core
crates.blurb_md: Shared component types and reflection registration used across all vmux crates.

crates.name: vmux_browser
crates.blurb_md:
Browser and page-open orchestration on top of `bevy_cef`: page resolution, CEF
backend management, and input forwarding between the native layout and embedded pages.

crates.name: vmux_terminal
crates.blurb_md:
Terminal page: spawns and drives shell processes through the background service and
renders them in a CEF + Dioxus terminal webview.

crates.name: vmux_agent
crates.blurb_md:
Agent integration: pluggable CLI agent strategies (vibe, claude, codex), session
lifecycle and discovery, and the ECS messaging that lets agents drive screenshots,
recordings, browser snapshots, and layout commands.

crates.name: vmux_editor
crates.blurb_md:
File viewer and editor page: loading, editing, syntax highlighting, file watching,
image preview, and LSP integration in a CEF + Dioxus webview.

crates.name: vmux_layout
crates.blurb_md:
The window and layout shell: spaces, tabs, panes, stacks, focus ring, header and
side-sheet, command-bar input, and the single CEF layout webview that composes every page.

crates.name: vmux_git
crates.blurb_md:
Host-side git engine: runs git operations on background threads and bridges results
to the `files://` editor page.

crates.name: vmux_space
crates.blurb_md:
Spaces (workspace groupings): CRUD over named spaces, per-space startup URL and
directory, active-space tracking, and the spaces list webview.

crates.name: vmux_history
crates.blurb_md:
Browsing history: records visits, prunes old entries, serves history queries and
command-bar suggestions, and renders the history webview.

crates.name: vmux_command
crates.blurb_md:
The command vocabulary and command-bar wire protocol: the `AppCommand` type, the
issue/read system-set ordering, and the snapshots the command bar consumes.

crates.name: vmux_service
crates.blurb_md:
Background daemon that hosts persistent terminal processes across app restarts, plus
the processes-monitor webview page.

crates.name: vmux_setting
crates.blurb_md:
Application settings: a typed schema (appearance, editor, browser, agent, lsp,
shortcuts, spaces), RON load/save with debounce, theme definitions, and the settings webview.

crates.name: vmux_mcp
crates.blurb_md:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) stdio server exposing Vmux workspace controls as tools
for external agents.

crates.name: vmux_team
crates.blurb_md:
Team and profiles view: represents the user and the agents in the active space as
team members and renders the team webview.

crates.name: vmux_ui
crates.blurb_md: Dioxus WASM UI library: [`components`] and [`hooks`] for CEF IPC.

crates.name: vmux_server
crates.blurb_md:
Serves embedded webview page bundles over `vmux://` URLs on the host, and on wasm
dispatches the web build to the correct per-host Dioxus page.

crates.name: vmux_desktop
crates.blurb_md:
The desktop application: the top-level binary and [`VmuxPlugin`] that wire every crate
together, plus macOS-native integrations (glass/blur, event tap, native focus, tray,
menu, recording, persistence).

crates.name: vmux
crates.blurb_md:
The `vmux` command-line entry point: launches and controls the app and dispatches the
MCP server, OS notifications, and the background service.

crates.name: vmux_macro
crates.blurb_md:
Internal procedural-macro crate: derive macros that generate command-bar, shortcut,
MCP-tool, and OS-menu boilerplate from enums.
